title: heliotropium luteum
intro: Heliotropium luteum, also known as Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heliotropium luteum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Heliotropium luteum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
